title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, January 25 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 25/01/2022
Image reference: 2022-01-25_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-january-25-2022_img1.png
Tanker: Tanker values have softened. VLCC Sea Lynx (318,300 DWT, Nov 2004, Hyundai Samho Heavy Ind) sold to Middle Eastern buyers for USD 32.20 mil, VV value USD 29.41 mil - BWTS Fitted. Suezmax Nordic Mistral (164,200 DWT, Oct 2002, Hyundai Samho Heavy Ind) sold for USD 15.80 mil, VV value USD 17.29 mil.
